title: A School Sport Should be Dressing up like Knights and Doing Battle

transcript.text: A cool new thing we should incorporate in our physical education departments in our high schools should be knight battles, where people dress up as knights.
I think it's very physically demanding, and it can be quite fun.
And it integrates history, real history, into our lives and helps us understand how history was.
If you have two knights, you have kids dressed up in real knight outfits, with the same exact metal, the same exact weight, the same exact chainmail, everything.
And you have swords that weigh the same weight.
And they jump in there and they clank their swords.
And then if you push the sword into the area of the knight, like under his arm or up against his neck, at a certain strength, you would have big balls in the tips of the swords.
And then you have an extra thick, just to protect the person, of leather or something.
And then you have a sensor, and if you push it in strong enough for the realistic amount of pressure you'd have to do to kill the guy, then you win the battle.
And so you could get teams of people, all these knights get up there, and it's a really good exercise because you're out there swinging the sword as hard as you can.
